naming_exceptions.reason: The published ordered ADR convention keeps the sequence and decision title together as the repository's stable decision-history path.
naming_exceptions.control: The decisions index and cross-references bind the exact ordered path and ADR content records status, rationale, consequences, checks, and review triggers.
naming_exceptions.review: Rename only through an explicit ADR history migration that updates every reference atomically.

naming_exceptions.reason: The numeric prefix is the durable published ADR sequence, not a temporary or date-based implementation marker.
naming_exceptions.control: A repository link check can verify ordering while ADR review records supersession rather than rewriting historical identifiers.
naming_exceptions.review: Remove only if the repository adopts a different versioned ADR identity convention.

artifact_exemptions.reason: This directory is generated by the deterministic plugin-builder distribution runner from canonical packages and skills.
artifact_exemptions.control: The plugin build and parity check compare the generated tree against canonical staging inputs; contributors never hand-edit it.
artifact_exemptions.review: Remove when this path ceases to be generated distribution output or the canonical staging authority changes.
